leadText: Pineapple (Japanese: カットパイン Cut Pine) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V This very tart ingredient is a fruit of southern lands, and its color and texture are a thrill. It's been cut into chunks to be easily manageable.

sections.title: In the core series games

It's been cut into chunks to be easily manageable.
